title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF CENTRAL LANE HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Habitat for Humanity provides an opportunity for people to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner partners, who provide participation hours in construction and other opportunities to help build the houses. 1210 Oak Patch Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Households currently living in substandard housing that meet all of the following requirements: -Meet income guidelines (people within the 40-80% area median income - see website for full income requirements) -Can commit to 200-250 hours of participation hours including construction (100 hours) and 100+ hours of financial courses, support meetings, and other volunteer opportunities -Are United States citizens or permanent residents -Have not have owned a home in the past 3 years -Have the ability to make a mortgage payment (steady income and decent credit history) Hours: All services are by appointment only: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 741-1707 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 741-1707 Administration (541) 741-1707 John Barnum [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Application based program. Call, or visit website for more information. FEES: No application fees. Households are responsible for home purchase closing fees of up to $3000. 0% down payment for closing costs and a low-interest mortgage. Mortgage specifics vary depending on income; Habitat sets the mortgage so that the monthly mortgage payment (which includes taxes, insurance, and condo fees, if applicable) is no more than 30% of the homeowner’s gross monthly income at the time of sale. DOCUMENTS: Financial information, including statements of income and debt. Personal identification including Social Security number. AREA SERVED: Central and Southern Lane County (Cities of Cottage Grove, Creswell, Elmira, Eugene, Springfield, and Veneta and other outlying areas). Does not serve Cities of Harrisburg, Junction City, or Monroe. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Off W 11th Avenue Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HABITAT CENTRAL LANE RESTORE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MINOR HOME REPAIR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF CENTRAL LANE
